title: Standard values for subitems

posts.author: Jan-Hendrik (Jan-Hendrik)
posts.cookedHtml:
Dear all,

it would be great to have the opportunity to set standard values for subitems - much the same way as it is already possible for normal items - or at least be able to solve this issue via automatizations.

When a new subitem is created I’d like to automatically add some information, e.g. person column.

Thanks
Jan-Hendrik
